referenceSample.instructions: pls follow the approved PPS comments provided for both PO's 089008/ 088854

zh.instructions: 请遵循提供的批准的产前样备注，适用于PO's 089008/ 088854

actions.instructions:
1. Please add/take those pictures inside the generic picture section (3 dots menu (top right corner) > Camera): Factory Front Gate / Inspector in front of factory / Warehouse / Finished and Packed products / Finished but not packed / Semi-finished products / Total carton selected / Total pieces selected / All defectives pieces / Factory disclaimer / COC / (Draft Report - Optional)

2. All pictures must have captions in the report. 

3. Include 1 photo of each test in the checklist and avoid multiple photos.

4. For any "no" response in the inspection details, comments must be added under the summary review remarks checkpoint. 

5. Factory address must be written in ENGLISH, not in Chinese

6.The approval sample and production sample tag must be used during comparison checking and take pictures. 

7.Always provide a complete list of all defects found by PO number. If large amounts of units are found with defects in the bulk, the information must clearly be explained at the
beginning of the report in this section. 
Example: booking with 2 POs and workmanship Sample size 50
 - PO xxx: 5pcs defect founds
 - PO xxx: no defects found
 - Total: 10% defect found 

8. SPECIFICATIONS: One photo is required for each checkpoint. Avoid duplicated photos.
9. Please include pictures of the boxes on the pallets, the pictures with the seals and the labelling on the side of the boxes. 
10. Do not include pictures of measuring the boxes and the carton drop test. Only include if the test FAILS. 
11. In the event of color bleeding, a remark should be added to the report indicating the factory’s reason for the issue.
12.Inspector must always put clear remark in the inspection report if the factory address is different from address in the booking.

zh.instructions:
1. 请在通用图片部分添加/拍摄这些图片（右上角的三个点菜单 > 相机）：工厂正门 / 验货员在工厂前 / 仓库 / 完成且已包装的产品 / 完成但未包装 / 半成品 / 总抽箱数量 / 总抽样数量 / 所有缺陷件 / 工厂免责声明 / COC / （草稿报告 - 可选）
2. 所有图片必须在报告中有标题。
3. 在检查清单中包含每个测试的1张照片，避免多张照片。
4. 对于检查详情中的任何“否”回应，必须在总结审查备注检查点下添加评论。
5. 工厂地址必须用英文书写，而不是中文。
6. 在比较检查时，必须使用批准样品和生产样品标签并拍照。
7. 始终提供按PO编号列出的所有缺陷的完整清单。如果在大货中发现大量缺陷单位，信息必须在此部分的报告开头清晰说明。
示例：预定2个PO，工艺抽样数量50
PO xxx：发现5pcs缺陷
- PO xxx：未发现缺陷
- 总计：发现10%缺陷
8. 规格：每个检查点需要1张照片。避免重复照片。
9. 请包含托盘上箱子的照片、带封条的照片以及箱子侧面的标签。
10. 不要包含测量箱子和摔箱测试的照片。仅在测试不通过时包含。
11. 如果出现颜色渗色，报告中应添加备注，说明工厂对此问题的原因。
12. 如果工厂地址与预定中的地址不同，验货员必须在检查报告中清楚备注。

actions.instructions:
Packaging and shipping marks
a. Carton side must be written "Made in China/Fabrique en Chine", if a mistake is found, (eg: “Fait en Chine”), this is a MINOR defect pls put a remark in the report, no need to Fail this section.
b. Shipping Mark, for the misspelling of color and country of origin on the boxes, this is a MINOR defect, pls put a remark in the report, no need to Fail this section.
c.If the Folding Method is different from Tech pack, please include comments in the Other Remark section. No need to Fail this section in the report.

CHECKPOINTS:
a. An inspection must be done with approved client samples and a tech pack on-site. 
b. Service booking details must align with the on-site products to be inspected:
- The style number, color(s), lot no., and PO number from the booking must be evident on the following product identification components:
• Header of the Care and Content label pages (style number, PO number only)
• Serial barcode hangtag (style number, color (s), PO number, Lot number)
• Shipping carton marking (style number, color (s), Size(s), PO number, Lot number)
c. Important: Put the labels and content labels pictures for the Specification section of the report
-The inspector needs to put the labels and content labels pictures in the report.  
d. If there is a visual variation or damages with any labels with Brand Logo between approval sample and bulk. Report should Fail since the Brand logo is considered as a CRITICAL defect
e. If there is a visual variation on the size tab between approval and production, the report should Fail since the sizing label is a MAJOR defect.
f. Misprinting or variation on sequence of languages on care content labels, compared to approval sample is approved, this is not a reason to fail the report.
g. If lot is to be shipped on hangers, they must have the Joseph Ribkoff logo on hangers as specified in tech pack.
h. Swift attaches for the serial tags must be in black color. If they come in clear color must be written in the Other Remarks section in the report. This is a MINOR defect, no need to Fail this section.
i. For Denim pants: Joker tags must be sewn on with thread, if they are attached with black plastic swift attaches, this is a MINOR defect, pls put a remark in the report, no need to Fail this section.
j. For Shading issues, please provide clear photos with the approval sample (unless otherwise specified, not for color reference). Need detailed comments since the shading is important.

zh.instructions:
包装和唛头
a. 箱子侧面必须写“Made in China/Fabrique en Chine”，如果发现错误（例如：“Fait en Chine”），这属于轻微缺陷，请在报告中备注，无需不通过此部分。
b. 唛头，如果箱子上的颜色和原产国拼写错误，这属于轻微缺陷，请在报告中备注，无需不通过此部分。
c. 如果折叠方式与技术包不同，请在其他备注部分中添加评论。报告中无需不通过此部分。
检查点：
a. 必须使用批准的客户样品和现场技术包进行检查。
b. 服务预定详细信息必须与待检产品一致：
- 样式编号、颜色、批号和预定中的PO编号必须在以下产品识别组件中显现：
• 护理和内容标签页面的标题（样式编号，仅PO编号）
• 串行条形码吊牌（样式编号、颜色、PO编号、批号）
• 运输箱标记（样式编号、颜色、尺寸、PO编号、批号）
c. 重要：将标签和内容标签的照片放入报告的规格部分
- 验货员需要在报告中放入标签和内容标签的照片。
d. 如果批准样品与大货之间的任何带品牌标志的标签存在视觉差异或损坏，报告应不通过，因为品牌标志被视为关键缺陷。
e. 如果批准样品与生产之间的尺寸标签存在视觉差异，报告应不通过，因为尺寸标签是主要缺陷。
f. 护理内容标签上的语言序列印刷错误或变化，与批准样品相比被批准，这不是不通过报告的理由。
g. 如果批次要在衣架上运输，必须在衣架上有Joseph Ribkoff的标志，如技术包中所指定。
h. 串行标签的快速附件必须为黑色。如果它们是透明颜色，必须在报告的其他备注部分中写明。这是轻微缺陷，无需不通过此部分。
i. 对于牛仔裤：小丑标签必须用线缝合，如果用黑色塑料快速附件附上，这是轻微缺陷，请在报告中备注，无需不通过此部分。
j. 对于阴影问题，请提供与批准样品的清晰照片（除非另有说明，不用于颜色参考）。需要详细评论，因为阴影很重要。

elements.instruction:
Please input the total quantity finished and packed in pcs and %, the total quantity finished and unpacked in pcs and %.
If products are not ready for inspection:
      - Check the available product and semi-finished product and ask the factory to provide the packing material if available. 
      - Marked inspection as FAILED.
      - If there is no product (semi-finished product) available in factory, issue a MISSED REPORT.
elements.expectedResult:
Quantity Ready and Packed should be matching the service type (100% / 80% for PSI - 20 % / 20% for DUPRO - 5% / 5% for IPC - ...)

Pls follow the below template on your comment.
XXXX Pcs(XX%) Finished & Packed
XXXX Pcs(XX%) Finished & Unpacked

For PSI, 100% of the shipping quantity must be finished and at least 80% of the order quantity must be packed. 
- Finished quantity = 100% and Packed quantity>80%, Proceed to Inspection. Any discrepancy in the inspection quantity from the booking quantity must be indicated (shortage or overage) on the inspection report details
- Finished quantity = 100% and Packed quantity<80%, Inform Quality. Issue MISSING INSPECTION REPORT. 

For DUPRO, 20% of the shipping quantity must be finished and at least 20% of the order quantity must be packed. 
- Finished quantity>20% and Packed quantity>20%, Proceed Inspection. 
- 0%< Finished quantity<20% and 0%<Packed quantity<20%, Inform Quality. Issue MISSING INSPECTION REPORT.

comment.message: 1219(101.58%) pcs were finished and packed, and the shipment quantity was 1219 pcs.

en.message: 1219(101.58%) pcs were finished and packed, and the shipment quantity was 1219 pcs.

zh.name: 可用数量检查：完成&已包装&未包装
zh.expectedResult:
准备和包装的数量应与服务类型匹配（100% / 80%用于PSI - 20% / 20%用于DUPRO - 5% / 5%用于IPC - ...）
请按照以下模板填写您的评论。
XXXX Pcs(XX%) 完成且已包装
XXXX Pcs(XX%) 完成且未包装
对于PSI，100%的运输数量必须完成，且至少80%的订单数量必须已包装。
- 完成数量 = 100%且已包装数量>80%，继续检查。任何检查数量与预定数量的差异必须在检查报告详细信息中注明（短缺或过量）。
- 完成数量 = 100%且已包装数量<80%，通知质量。发出缺失检查报告。
对于DUPRO，20%的运输数量必须完成，且至少20%的订单数量必须已包装。
- 完成数量>20%且已包装数量>20%，继续检查。
- 0%< 完成数量<20%且0%<已包装数量<20%，通知质量。发出缺失检查报告。
zh.instruction:
请输入已完成和已包装的总数量（以pcs和%表示），已完成和未包装的总数量（以pcs和%表示）。
如果产品未准备好进行检查：
- 检查可用产品和半成品，并要求工厂提供包装材料（如果可用）。
- 标记检查为不通过。
- 如果工厂没有可用的产品（半成品），发出缺失报告。

elements.name: Available Quantity Check: Finished&Packed&Unpacked

elements.instruction: Please fill in the quantity details for item/reference/sku available on-site.
elements.expectedResult: - Kindly filled out clearly the quantity.

zh.name: 可用数量详情
zh.expectedResult: - 请清楚填写数量。
zh.instruction: 请填写现场可用的物品/参考/sku的数量详情。

elements.name: Available Quantity Details

elements.instruction:
Were you able to select the cartons / sampling size fully randomly ? 
If yes, the result is passed, If not, the result is failed.
elements.expectedResult:
1. Take a picture of the stacks of cartons before selection​
2. Choose cartons from every pallet/stack.​
3. Choose cartons from different parts of the stack (top, bottom, left, right, front, back, middle, inside), including not accessible cartons ​
4. Ask factory for support in moving the goods if they are not accessible​
5. Take a picture of the stack after the selecting the cartons, showing how the random selection was done. ​
6. Take a picture of all selected cartons​
7. Follow the cartons from the warehouse to the inspection area, make sure they are not tempered with. ​
8. Add a remark in the report and inform back-office if you cannot proceed with the random carton selection, explaining the reason.

* Please include pictures of the boxes on the pallets, the pictures with the seals, and the labeling on the side of the boxes.

zh.name: 随机抽箱
zh.expectedResult:
1. 在选择之前拍摄纸箱堆的照片​
2. 从每个托盘/堆中选择纸箱。​
3. 从堆的不同部分选择纸箱（顶部、底部、左侧、右侧、前面、后面、中间、内部），包括无法触及的纸箱​
4. 如果无法触及货物，请向工厂请求支持移动货物​
5. 在选择纸箱后拍摄堆的照片，展示随机选择的方式。​
6. 拍摄所有选定纸箱的照片​
7. 从仓库跟随纸箱到检查区域，确保它们没有被掉包。​
8. 如果您无法继续随机抽箱，请在报告中添加备注并通知办公室，解释原因。
* 请包含托盘上箱子的照片、带封条的照片以及箱子侧面的标签。
zh.instruction:
您是否能够完全随机选择纸箱/抽样尺寸？
如果是，结果为通过；如果不是，结果为不通过。

elements.expectedResult:
- If there is a visual variation on the size tab between approval and production, the report should Fail since the sizing label is a MAJOR defect.
- Misprinting or variation on sequence of languages on care content labels, compared to approval sample is approved, this is not a reason to fail the report. 
- Swift attaches for the serial tags must be in black color. If they come in clear color must be written in the Other Remarks section in the report. This is a MINOR defect, no need to Fail this section.
- For Denim pants: Joker tags must be sewn on with thread, if they are attached with black plastic swift attaches, this is a MINOR defect, pls put a remark in the report, no need to Fail this section.
- Group pictures together. (example: care labels together- hang tags together)

zh.name: 产品标签
zh.expectedResult:
- 如果批准样品与生产之间的尺寸标签存在视觉差异，报告应不通过，因为尺寸标签是主要缺陷。
- 护理内容标签上的语言序列印刷错误或变化，与批准样品相比被批准，这不是不通过报告的理由。
- 串行标签的快速附件必须为黑色。如果它们是透明颜色，必须在报告的其他备注部分中写明。这是轻微缺陷，无需不通过此部分。
- 对于牛仔裤：小丑标签必须用线缝合，如果用黑色塑料快速附件附上，这是轻微缺陷，请在报告中备注，无需不通过此部分。
- 将图片分组在一起。（例如：护理标签在一起-吊牌在一起）

elements.name: Product Labels

elements.instruction:
The approval sample is identified with a green “QIMA SAMPLE” tag attached.

Check the dimensions, shape, style or color of the product against the approval sample if it's on-site and take for pictures.
elements.expectedResult:
The products should be matched with the approval sample, a detailed caption is needed on approval sample and the bulk products.

- Inspection must be done with approved client samples and tech pack on-site.
- Take clear photos of the approval sample next to the bulk product/ actual sample.
- Comparison Pictures and the description should be consistent with the pictures.

zh.name: 批准样品比较
zh.expectedResult:
产品应与批准样品匹配，批准样品和大货产品需要详细标题。
- 检查必须使用批准客户样品和现场技术包进行。
- 拍摄批准样品与大货产品/实际样品的清晰照片。
- 比较图片和描述应与图片一致。
zh.instruction:
批准样品用绿色“QIMA SAMPLE”标签标识。
检查产品的尺寸、形状、样式或颜色是否与现场的批准样品相符，并拍照。

elements.name: Approval Sample Comparison

zh.name: Joseph Ribkoff - 产品规格 - SL

elements.instruction: Follow the measurement chart template and upload it in the report.
elements.expectedResult:
1. Please follow the attachment in this section: How to measure guideline.
2. Please use attached measurement chart format to record data:
     • Style number must be written in the chart and the report
     • No empty column in the chart
     • Top column bulk measurement to be identified with sizes/color.
     • Measurements out of tolerances to be highlighted in yellow, if the out of tolerance measurements are +/- 1/8”, this is considered a minor defect, pls put a remark in the report, no need to Fail this section.
3. For denim category only the total of units to be measured is now 20 units. 
4. Follow POM (mandatory point of measurements) template attached for Denim Pant/Skirt, Knit/Sweater, Jacket/Coat, Dress/Blouse. Critical measurement point (follow POM attached)
    •Other products follow booking attachment measurement points.

zh.name: 产品尺寸结果
zh.expectedResult:
1. 请遵循本节中的附件：测量指南。
2. 请使用附加的测量图表格式记录数据：
• 样式编号必须写在图表和报告中
• 图表中不得有空列
• 顶部列的大货测量应标识尺寸/颜色。
• 超出公差的测量应突出显示为黄色，如果超出公差的测量为+/- 1/8”，这被视为轻微缺陷，请在报告中备注，无需不通过此部分。
3. 对于牛仔类别，现需测量的单位总数为20个单位。
4. 按照附加的POM（测量点）模板进行牛仔裤/裙子、针织/毛衣、夹克/外套、连衣裙/衬衫的测量。关键测量点（遵循附加的POM）
• 其他产品遵循预定附件的测量点。
zh.instruction: 遵循测量图表模板并将其上传到报告中。

elements.name: Product Dimensions Result

elements.expectedResult:
- Please provide a very clear picture of measurements + highlighted out of tolerance specs, defect pictures followed. 
- Don’t Fail the report if the measurements are out of tolerance +/- 1/8.
b. Must need to insert the attached POM measurement chart format in the report. Please refer to sections MEASUREMENTS above for more details. 
c. Please double-check the style number in the report with the measurement chart.
d. For denim category only the total of units to be measured is 20 units

columns.name: Total # of POM out of tolerance
Total # of POM out of tolerance

zh.name: 产品尺寸项目详情
zh.expectedResult:
- 请提供非常清晰的测量照片 + 突出显示超出公差的规格，后续缺陷照片。
- 如果测量超出公差+/- 1/8，请不要不通过报告。
b. 必须在报告中插入附加的POM测量图表格式。请参考上述“测量”部分以获取更多详细信息。
c. 请仔细检查报告中的样式编号与测量图表是否一致。
d. 对于牛仔类别，现需测量的单位总数为20个单位。

elements.name: Product Dimensions Item Details

zh.name: Joseph Ribkoff - 产品尺寸 SL

actions.instructions:
a. Only include 1 photo of each test in the checklist and avoid multiple photos.
b. For Denim Pant/Pants: If there is leg twisting identified during the inspection. Pant must be fitted on a fit model to validate the findings. A clear front and back view picture must be taken on the fit model.
c. Please have samples try on a fit model and provide photos in the report.
d. All products must have anti-mold sheets or desiccant packs, as mentioned in the tech pack.
e. Barcode scan test
- The inspector should be using the UPC  13 scan and not the UPC 12. 
- Upload the pictures per barcode type and put a remark in the report if missing leading 0, no need to Fail this section.

zh.instructions:
a. 每个检查清单中仅包含1张照片，避免多张照片。
b. 对于牛仔裤：如果在检查中发现腿部扭曲，必须在合身模型上试穿裤子以验证结果。必须在合身模型上拍摄清晰的正面和背面视图照片。
c. 请让样品在合身模型上试穿，并在报告中提供照片。
d. 所有产品必须有防霉纸或干燥剂包，如技术包中所提到的。
e. 条形码扫描测试
- 验货员应使用UPC 13扫描，而不是UPC 12。
- 按条形码类型上传照片，如缺少前导0，请在报告中备注，无需不通过此部分。

elements.instruction:
Check and compare Zipper with tech pack and approval sample. 
1. Close and open the zip.
2. Measure zip length: must be in tolerance 
3. Handle zip and put some pressure on it when it closed.
elements.expectedResult:
The zip should lock when it is closed. 
The zip should firmly stop and must not detach when sliding to the end. 
Must not open in the middle. 
The zip quality should be out of any visual defects, corrosion, nor waving.

zh.name: 拉链测试
zh.expectedResult:
拉链关闭时应能锁定。
拉链应牢固停止，滑动到尽头时不得脱落。
中间不得打开。
拉链质量应无任何外观瑕疵、腐蚀或波浪。
zh.instruction:
检查并比较拉链与技术包和批准样品。
1. 关闭并打开拉链。
2. 测量拉链长度：必须在公差范围内。
3. 处理拉链并在关闭时施加一些压力。

elements.name: Zipper test

elements.instruction:
1. Check and compare the button and buttonhole with approval sample and tech pack 
2. Check the stitches and buttons are fixed securely by pulling on the buttons.
3. Test the button with the buttonhole- must be able to open and close easily.
4. Check for spare buttons (if specified).
elements.expectedResult:
1. The placement, dimension, color and shape must be according to tech pack approval sample.
2. The button and buttonhole stitching shall be fixed securely.

zh.name: 按钮检查
zh.expectedResult:
1. 按钮的位置、尺寸、颜色和形状必须符合技术包批准样品。
2. 按钮和扣眼的缝合应固定牢固。
zh.instruction:
1. 检查并比较按钮和扣眼与批准样品和技术包。
2. 通过拉动按钮检查缝线和按钮是否固定牢固。
3. 用扣眼测试按钮——必须能够轻松打开和关闭。
4. 检查备用按钮（如有规定）。

elements.name: Button check

elements.instruction:
1. Check that the product is well ironed (if specified)
2. Check that the product can be folded into the specified shape (if specified)
3. Check that the product has been washed and/or treated (if specified)
elements.expectedResult:
f the product has:
-Over-pressing marks, or shinny marks.
-Lines or marks left from plate use to install decorative trims.
-Poor pressing, wrinkles, pleats or seams not flat.
-Garment not thoroughly dried resulting in excessive wrinkling garment.

zh.name: 熨烫、洗涤、处理检查
zh.expectedResult:
如果产品有：
- 过度压痕或光泽痕迹。
- 装饰性修边使用的板留下的线条或痕迹。
- 压制不良、皱纹、褶皱或缝合不平整。
- 衣物未彻底干燥，导致过度皱褶。
zh.instruction:
1. 检查产品是否熨烫良好（如有规定）。
2. 检查产品是否可以折叠成指定形状（如有规定）。
3. 检查产品是否已洗涤和/或处理（如有规定）。

elements.name: Ironing, washing, treatment check

elements.instruction:
1. Check the specified pockets / holders and compare with specifications or approval sample.
2. Check that the pocket / holder is formed and finished and compare with specifications or to approval sample.
3.The pocket should be reinforced by a bartack or rivet, following the specifications.
elements.expectedResult: The specified pockets / holders are present, attached correctly and attached in the correct positions. As per specification, bartacks or rivets reinforce the pocket.

zh.name: 口袋/置物袋检查
zh.expectedResult: 指定的口袋/置物袋应存在、正确附加并附加在正确位置。根据规格，口袋应由加固缝或铆钉加强。
zh.instruction:
1. 检查指定的口袋/置物袋并与规格或批准样品进行比较。
2. 检查口袋/置物袋是否形成并完成，并与规格或批准样品进行比较。
3. 口袋应由缝合或铆钉加固，遵循规格。

elements.name: Pocket / holder check

elements.instruction: Check and pull button, snap, hook, or any other trims specified in tech pack and approval sample, with the specified force and duration.
elements.expectedResult: The trims shall not break, not deform or be damaged, or come undone at the seams in anyway during or after use.

zh.name: 拉力测试
zh.expectedResult: 装饰物不得在使用过程中或之后破裂、变形或受损，或在缝合处以任何方式松脱。
zh.instruction: 检查并拉动按钮、扣子、钩子或技术包和批准样品中指定的任何其他装饰物，施加指定的力量和持续时间。

elements.name: Pull test

elements.instruction: Repeatedly use the product and its adjustable parts to the full extent of their capacity for 20 cycles, or following the client specifications if there is any.
elements.expectedResult: The product or part shall not break, deform or be damaged in anyway after use; it should still function normally, without any loss.

zh.name: 疲劳测试
zh.expectedResult: 产品或部件在使用后不得破裂、变形或受损；应能正常功能，无任何损失。
zh.instruction: 重复使用产品及其可调部件至其容量的最大限度进行20个循环，或根据客户规格进行。

elements.name: Fatigue test

elements.instruction:
1. Smell the product, checking for any odor;
2. Compare to that of the approval sample.
elements.expectedResult: No offensive or unexpected odor.

zh.name: 气味检查
zh.expectedResult: 无异味或刺鼻的气味。
zh.instruction:
1. 闻一下产品，检查是否有任何气味；
2. 与批准样品进行比较。

elements.name: Odor check

elements.instruction:
Pull the product by hand at the seam location to test the strength of the seam.
-using force (70N for 10s) to inspect for the needle holes, seam slippage and other defects
elements.expectedResult:
The seams should not break or open or have any other defects. 
Check that there is no obvious damage from needles from construction.

zh.name: 接缝强度测试
zh.expectedResult:
接缝不得破裂或打开或有任何其他缺陷。
检查是否有明显的针孔损伤。
zh.instruction:
用手拉动产品的接缝位置以测试接缝的强度。
- 使用力（70N，持续10秒）检查针孔、接缝滑移和其他缺陷。

elements.name: Seam strength test

elements.expectedResult: There should not be any peel off after the tape is removed, nor any color transferred onto the tape.

zh.name: 粘合剂测试
zh.expectedResult: 移除胶带后不得有剥离现象，也不得有颜色转移到胶带上。
zh.instruction:
1. 使用一条压敏胶带（例如3M 500）并将其牢固地贴在要测试的区域：艺术品、标志、标记；
2. 按压在表面上，使胶带牢固粘贴，无气泡或皱纹；
3. 以接近180度的角度迅速移除胶带，但不要猛拉。
4. 重复此操作3次。

elements.name: Adhesive test

zh.name: 金属/针检测检查
zh.expectedResult:
- 机器应将包装区域与生产线隔离，以确保包装线上的100%产品通过机器；
- 产品不得有任何外来金属物体；
- 校准应可用且保持最新。
zh.instruction:
1. 检查产品在金属检测机器周围的工作流程；
2. 检查金属检测机器的校准；
3. 使用机器扫描整个样品数量。

elements.name: Metal / needle detection check

elements.expectedResult: The deviation should be within the acceptable range as per the specifications, if there is no specification available, use grey scale 4 as the acceptable limit.

zh.name: 色差检查
zh.expectedResult: 偏差应在规格允许的范围内，如果没有可用规格，则使用灰度4作为可接受的限制。
zh.instruction:
将检查的产品并排放置；
确定从一个样品到另一个样品的任何颜色偏差；
检查色差与批准样品或生产批准样品的对比。

elements.name: Color shading check

elements.instruction:
Check the quantity and assortment in each package.
Record the assortment of the package (number of piece of each model, color, etc.)
elements.expectedResult: The quantity and assortment should match the expectations.

zh.name: 数量和混装检查（每包）
zh.expectedResult: 数量和混装应符合预期。
zh.instruction:
检查每包的数量和混装。
记录包内的混装（每种型号、颜色的数量等）。

elements.name: Quantity and assortment check (per package)

elements.instruction:
1. Connect scanner to a PC and scan barcode.
2. Scan any barcode on the product and compare the results to the code under the barcodes (if any) and to the specifications.
3. For barcode scanning result missed leading 0 -DO NOT FAIL.
elements.expectedResult:
1. Barcode must match the client's specifications.
2. It should be scannable and have the correct number.

zh.name: 条形码扫描测试
zh.expectedResult:
1. 条形码必须符合客户的规格。
2. 应可扫描并具有正确的编号。
zh.instruction:
1. 将扫描仪连接到PC并扫描条形码。
2. 扫描产品上的任何条形码，并将结果与条形码下的代码（如有）和规格进行比较。
3. 对于条形码扫描结果缺少前导0 - 不得不通过。

elements.name: Barcode scanning test

elements.instruction: Count the number of stitches per inch compared to specifications or approval sample.
elements.expectedResult: The number of stitches per inch are correct to specifications or approval sample.

zh.name: 缝合密度检查
zh.expectedResult: 每英寸的缝合数量应符合规格或批准样品。
zh.instruction: 计算每英寸的缝合数量，与规格或批准样品进行比较。

elements.name: Stitch density check

elements.instruction: Ensure that the product symmetry is respected: if possible, fold the product on its symmetry axis to do so and otherwise use a measurement tool to compare.
elements.expectedResult:
The product should be symmetric (unless specified otherwise).
-No Front and back Yoke seam uneven.
-no uneven collar, under collar and cuff sides in size and shape.
-no V-neck/keyhole or Collar off centered.

zh.name: 对称性检查
zh.expectedResult:
产品应对称（除非另有规定）。
- 前后肩缝不得不均匀。
- 领口、下领和袖口的尺寸和形状不得不均匀。
- V领/钥匙孔或领子不得偏离中心。
zh.instruction: 确保产品的对称性得到尊重：如有可能，将产品沿其对称轴折叠以做到这一点，否则使用测量工具进行比较。

elements.name: Symmetry check

elements.instruction:
1. Check that the specified labels are found attached to the product.
2. Check that the information of the label is correct to specifications.
elements.expectedResult:
1. All specified labels shall be present and attached correctly to the product.
2. The information on the labels shall be correct to specifications.
3. It should not have been modified by hand or with extra sticker.

zh.name: 标签检查
zh.expectedResult:
1. 所有指定的标签应存在并正确附加到产品上。
2. 标签上的信息应符合规格。
3. 不应手动修改或附加额外的贴纸。
zh.instruction:
1. 检查指定的标签是否附加在产品上。
2. 检查标签上的信息是否符合规格。

elements.name: Label check

elements.instruction:
if an elastic or ribbing is present anywhere on the garment 
For each size:
- Stretch the elastic or ribbing and compare the stretched length to the specifications;
- must not have poor recovery
elements.expectedResult: The stretched length should be within tolerances.

zh.name: 弹性袖口/腰带拉伸长度
zh.expectedResult: 拉伸长度应在公差范围内。
zh.instruction:
如果衣物上有弹性或罗纹
对于每个尺寸：
- 拉伸弹性或罗纹并将拉伸长度与规格进行比较；
- 不得有差劲的恢复能力。

elements.name: Elastic cuff/waistband stretched length

elements.instruction: Ensure rhinestone, pearl, beading are installed securely on fabric base, by applying some tension and slight friction on top of trims, to verify they are installed securely.

zh.name: 装饰物检查
zh.instruction: 确保水晶石、珍珠、珠子牢固安装在织物基底上，通过施加一些张力和轻微摩擦来验证它们是否牢固安装。

elements.name: Trims check

elements.instruction:
1. Use a piece of cotton fabric soaked in purified water to clean the test surface 

2.Rub the marking/printing/labeling for 15 seconds with a piece of cotton fabric soaked in alcohol with a specified force of 9N as per the UL standard (Underwriter Laboratories Inc.) 
 
3. After the test, compare the stained cotton fabric against the staining grey scale
elements.expectedResult:
-Clear and unmovable marking/printing/labeling 
-Cotton fabric is not stained

zh.name: 摩擦（标记）测试
zh.expectedResult:
- 清晰且不可移动的标记/印刷/标签
- 棉布不应被染污
zh.instruction:
1. 使用一块浸泡在纯净水中的棉布清洁测试表面
2. 用一块浸泡在酒精中的棉布以9N的指定力量摩擦标记/印刷/标签15秒，符合UL标准（美国保险商实验室）。
3. 测试后，将染污的棉布与染污灰度进行比较。

elements.name: Rubbing (marking) test

actions.instructions:
1. Yarn defects and holes must be classified as a Major defect 
2.Untrimmed threads, pls follow below 
> ¼” is a Major defect 
< ¼” is a Minor defect
3. A product containing wrinkles, over press marks or creases visible from 1m away is considered as a Major defect.
4. Any seams with excessive puckering, poor tension or linking, causing seams to open, is considered a Major defects
5. Shape/Form of a product is different than the specifications or approval samples is considered as a workmanship issue considered a Major defect.
6. If a trim installation and/or placement on a product is missing, not installed securely and/or falling off, it is considered as a Major defect. Must be as specified in tech pack and/or approval.
7. One photo for each defect found per the corresponding section. In the case of finding the same defect on multiple units, please have the total units' detailed information in the report. 
Please do not put more than 5 photo per defect.
8. In cases where there are multiple references or colors, only add 1 photo per color.
9. All DIRT/STAIN defects must be classified as MAJOR
10. All STITCHING defects must be classified as MAJOR

zh.instructions:
1. 纱线缺陷和孔必须被归类为重要缺陷。
2. 未修剪的线头，请遵循以下规定：
> ¼” 被视为重要缺陷
< ¼” 被视为次要缺陷
3. 产品上出现的皱纹、过度压痕或从1米远可见的折痕被视为重要缺陷。
4. 任何接缝有过度起皱、张力不足或链接，导致接缝打开，均视为重要缺陷。
5. 产品的形状/形式与规格或批准样品不同被视为工艺问题，属于重要缺陷。
6. 如果缺少装饰物的安装和/或位置不当、未牢固安装和/或掉落，则视为重要缺陷。必须符合技术包和/或批准的规定。
7. 每个缺陷的相应部分需提供一张照片。如果在多个单位上发现相同缺陷，请在报告中提供总件数的详细信息。
请每个缺陷不要超过5张照片。
8. 在有多个参考或颜色的情况下，仅添加每种颜色1张照片。
9. 所有污垢/污渍缺陷必须归类为重要缺陷。
10. 所有缝合缺陷必须归类为重要缺陷。

defects.name: Wrong or missing parts (CRI)
defects.description:
The product or any of its parts is missing, broken or damaged, corroded or unusable.
This includes any instructions not included with the product or are incorrect / incomplete.
If any of its parts product has:
- Scratches, dents, sharp edges, discoloration or corrosion. 
- Missing or damaged metal trims accessories with discoloration.
- Missing Press on, rhinestone, any decorative trim.

zh.name: 错误或缺失的部件（致命）
zh.description:
产品或其任何部件缺失、损坏或不可用。
这包括任何未随产品附带的说明或不正确/不完整的说明。
如果其任何部件有：
- 划痕、凹陷、锐利边缘、变色或腐蚀。
- 缺失或损坏的金属装饰配件，且有变色。
- 缺失压贴、水晶石或任何装饰物。

defects.name: Insect infestation
defects.description: The product contains insects either alive or dead, or insect made products (eggs, webs, etc.).

zh.name: 昆虫滋扰
zh.description: 产品含有活的或死的昆虫，或昆虫产生的产品（卵、网等）。

defects.name: Incorrect set assortment
defects.description:
1. The set contains an incorrect number of pieces;
2. The products are of incorrect size, color or type.

zh.name: 错误的混装
zh.description:
1. 套装包含错误数量的件数；
2. 产品的尺寸、颜色或类型不正确。

defects.name: Sharp points / edges
defects.description:
The product contains any non-functional, non-specified sharp extremity that can potentially cause harm. 

This include any protruding nail, screw or staple.

zh.name: 锐利的尖端/边缘
zh.description:
产品包含任何非功能性、未指定的锐利边缘，可能会造成伤害。
这包括任何突出钉子、螺丝或订书钉。

defects.name: Hole
defects.description:
Unexpected hole through the product
If the product is:
-showing scissor or knife cut in the fabric.
- punch holes 
- needles holes.

zh.name: 孔洞
zh.description:
产品上出现意外孔洞
如果产品有：
- 显示剪刀或刀切的面料。
- 打孔
- 针孔。

defects.name: Yarn defects (MAJ)
defects.description:
The yarn is drawn out / needle line, has knots, pilling, or has experienced breakage of the yarn visible.
If the product is:
-Inconsistency in sweater knit yarn pattern or motif.
-Missing knit yarn creating hole or damage.
-Slub, broken yarn, thread, filament coming out from fabric.
-Poor recovery on cuff/waistband rib tension.

zh.name: 纱线缺陷（重要）
zh.description:
纱线拉出/针线、打结、起球或出现可见的断裂。
如果产品有：
- 针织毛衣纱线图案或图案不一致。
- 缺失的针织纱线造成孔洞或损坏。
- 纱线、线头、细丝从面料中脱出。
- 袖口/腰带罗纹张力恢复差。

defects.name: Wrong color / discoloration (MAJ)
defects.description:
1. Product is found to be the wrong shade or color outside of the allowable 4-5 color shading range.
2. Shading between products in the same carton or within the product.
3. Uneven color.
4. Bleach spots.
5-Chemical process that have damaged the fabric.
6.Discoloration of the fabric or on the fiber or component of the fabric.

zh.name: 错误的颜色/变色（重要）
zh.description:
1. 产品被发现颜色或色调超出允许的4-5色差范围。
2. 同一纸箱内或产品内部之间的色差。
3. 颜色不均匀。
4. 漂白斑点。
5-化学过程损坏了面料。
6. 面料或面料的纤维或组件的变色。

defects.name: Missing or incorrect logo / brand (CRI)
defects.description:
The JR logo label and artwork is missing, incorrect, incomplete, misplaced or damaged.
The JR logo does not match the required color/spelling and grammar set in the required standards in the tech pack
If the product is:
-Missing, incorrect or damaged JR logo on any trims.
-Missing, incorrect or damaged JR logo on main label.
-Missing or incorrect size tab label/ care content label.
-Missing any buttons, snap, rivets, shank, press on, rhinestone and other trims.

zh.name: 缺失或错误的标志/品牌（致命）
zh.description:
JR标志标签和艺术品缺失、不正确、不完整、放错位置或损坏。
JR标志不符合技术包中规定的颜色/拼写和语法标准。
如果产品有：
- 任何装饰物上缺失、不正确或损坏的JR标志。
- 主标签上缺失、不正确或损坏的JR标志。
- 缺失或错误的尺码标签/护理内容标签。
- 缺失任何按钮、扣子、铆钉、带子、压贴、水晶石和其他装饰物。

defects.name: Dirt marks (MAJ)
defects.description:
The product contains any serious streaks, dirt stains, oil stains, grease stains, or pen mark stains.
The product is showing fabric contamination the size of a pen point.

zh.name: 污垢痕迹（重要）
zh.description:
产品上有任何严重的条纹、污垢污渍、油污、油脂污渍或笔迹污渍。
产品上显示的面料污染大小如同笔尖。

defects.name: Untrimmed Thread Ends
defects.description:
-All untrimmed thread ends on exterior of garment, or interior if shown on outside of garments.
+ 1/4" long is considered Major 
- 1/4" long is considered Minor 

-Untrimmed thread on the interior of the garment. If thread does not show on the exterior, could be consider as minor.

zh.name: 未修剪的线头
zh.description:
- 所有未修剪的线头在衣物外部，或如果在衣物外部可见则在内部。
长度超过1/4"被视为重要缺陷
- 1/4"长被视为次要缺陷
- 衣物内部的未修剪线头。如果线头不显示在外部，可能被视为次要缺陷。

defects.name: Fusing installation
defects.description:
Fusing not installed securely on the base fabric (collar, stand collar, cuff, facing).

If the product is:
-creases, wrinkles on the surface of the fabric.
-Lines, bubbles on the surface of the fabric.

zh.name: 熔合安装
zh.description:
熔合未牢固安装在基础面料上（领子、立领、袖口、面料）。
如果产品有：
- 面料表面有褶皱、皱纹。
- 面料表面有线条、气泡。

defects.name: Trims installation
defects.description:
Compare trims and placement to specifications on tech and approval sample.  The trims or any of its parts is poorly installed or sewn, loose on fabric base. 
if product is:
- installed with excess of glue.
- misaligned causing distortion.
- missing, not installed or sewn securely and falling off.
- by applying some tension and slight friction on top of trims, to verify they are installed securely.
Trims include: Buttons, shanks, snaps, zippers, motifs, bows, press fasteners hook and eye
rhinestone, pearl, beading

zh.name: 装饰物安装
zh.description:
将装饰物与技术包和批准样品的规格进行比较。装饰物或其任何部分安装或缝合不良，松动于面料基底上。
如果产品有：
- 安装过多的胶水。
- 错位导致变形。
- 缺失、未牢固安装或缝合，导致掉落。
- 通过施加一些张力和轻微摩擦来验证它们是否牢固安装。
装饰物包括：按钮、带子、扣子、拉链、图案、蝴蝶结、压扣钩和眼、
水晶石、珍珠、珠子。

defects.name: Seam defect
defects.description:
If the product is:
-Poor linking tension causing seams to open or puckering.
- Stretched or Distorted seams .
- Fraying seam edges 
-Seam with excessive puckering and poor tension.
-Front placket uneven, distorted with excessive puckering, no pleats or creases in bottom corners. 
-Neckline stretched out or distorted.

zh.name: 接缝缺陷
zh.description:
如果产品有：
- 链接张力不足导致接缝打开或起皱。
- 接缝拉伸或变形。
- 接缝边缘磨损。
- 接缝有过度起皱和张力不足。
- 前门襟不均匀，变形，过度起皱，底角无褶皱或折痕。
- 领口拉伸或变形。

defects.name: Stitching defect
defects.description:
If the product has:
- Any top stitching with broken, loose, uneven, irregular and slanted.
- Top stitching must be sewn along edge, must not deviate outside edges. 
- Bar tacks must be sewn straight and sufficient thread density. 
- Excess of thread inside of outside top stitching corners.

zh.name: 缝合缺陷
zh.description:
如果产品有：
- 任何缝合线断裂、松动、不均匀、不规则和倾斜。
- 顶缝必须沿边缘缝制，不得偏离外边缘。
- 加固缝必须缝制直且线密度足够。
- 顶缝角落内外多余的线。

defects.name: Pressing defect
defects.description:
If the product is:
-Deformed or distorted .
-With over-pressing marks, or shinny marks.
-Lines or marks left from plate use to install decorative trims.
-Poor pressing, wrinkles, pleats or seams not flat.
-Garment not thoroughly dried resulting in excessive wrinkling garment.

zh.name: 压制缺陷
zh.description:
如果产品有：
- 变形或失真。
- 过度压痕，或光泽痕迹。
- 装饰性修边使用的板留下的线条或痕迹。
- 压制不良、皱纹、褶皱或接缝不平整。
- 衣物未彻底干燥，导致过度皱褶。

defects.name: Pockets/Flaps defect
defects.description:
If the product is:
-Misaligned and uneven in size and shape.
-Pocket opening corners are not securely reinforced.

zh.name: 口袋/翻盖缺陷
zh.description:
如果产品有：
- 错位且尺寸和形状不均匀。
- 口袋开口角落未牢固加固。

defects.name: Fur trim defect
defects.description:
-The direction of the hair on the fur must follow requirement in the tech pack/documentation.
-Seam around the fur trim must be sewn securely, to prevent the fur fibers from coming out easily (shedding) when touching or brushing the fur trim.

zh.name: 毛皮装饰缺陷
zh.description:
- 毛皮上的毛发方向必须遵循技术包/文档中的要求。
- 毛皮装饰周围的接缝必须牢固缝合，以防止毛发纤维在触摸或刷毛皮装饰时轻易脱落（掉毛）。

defects.name: Incorrect or missing label (MAJ)
defects.description:
A label is missing, damaged, misplaced or incorrect, must be as per requirements in tech pack
- Missing or incorrect size tab label/ care content label.
- Missing or damaged hang tags or serial tags
- Missing any buttons, snap, rivets, shank, press on, rhinestone and other trims.,
- Damaged JR logo on any trims.
- Damaged JR logo on main label.
- Damaged JR logo on hang tags

zh.name: 错误或缺失的标签（重要）
zh.description:
标签缺失、损坏、放错位置或不正确，必须符合技术包中的要求。
- 缺失或错误的尺码标签/护理内容标签。
- 缺失或损坏的吊牌或序列标签。
- 缺失任何按钮、扣子、铆钉、带子、压贴、水晶石和其他装饰物。
- 任何装饰物上的JR标志损坏。
- 主标签上的JR标志损坏。
- 吊牌上的JR标志损坏。

defects.name: Asymmetry
defects.description: The product or its parts are asymmetric (non-design related).

defects.name: Yarn defects (MAJ)
defects.description: The yarn is drawn out / needle line, has knots, pilling, or has experienced breakage of the yarn visible from 1m away.

elements.instruction: Please confirm the factory location is the same as booked by the client.

zh.name: 工厂/车间位置是否与预定相同？
zh.instruction: 请确认工厂位置与客户预定的相同。

elements.name: Is the factory/workshop location same as booked?

elements.expectedResult:
Kindly provide the full English address of the inspection location with the postal code in the report, no other languages allowed.
Example, Building 1,3RD FLOOR,NO.86 DA MING ROAD, YUECHENG DISTRICT,SHAOXING CITY,ZHEJIANG PROVINCE,CHINA. Zip code: 312000
elements.value: Floor 5 Building 6, NO.2080 YongAn Road, Puyuan town, Tongxiang, Jiaxing, Zhejiang /314500

en.value: Floor 5 Building 6, NO.2080 YongAn Road, Puyuan town, Tongxiang, Jiaxing, Zhejiang /314500

zh.name: 检查位置
zh.expectedResult:
请在报告中提供检查位置的完整英文地址及邮政编码，禁止使用其他语言。
示例：浙江省绍兴市越城区大明路86号，3楼，1号楼。邮政编码：312000

elements.name: Inspection location

zh.name: 工厂合作、组织和清洁度

elements.instruction: Please confirm the lighting conditions in the inspection room.

zh.name: 检查室照明条件
zh.instruction: 请确认检查室的照明条件。

elements.name: Inspection Room Lighting Conditions

elements.instruction: Were the tools provided by the factory calibrated?

zh.name: 工具校准
zh.instruction: 工厂提供的工具是否经过校准？

elements.name: Tools calibration

elements.instruction:
1. Check that the cartons are on pallets (no contact with walls / floor, at least 0.5m away from window), dry (check the bottom of cartons) and without moisture or mold.
2. Check that the storing areas for cartons, products, fabrics and materials are clean, dry, with ventilation and without mold / water on walls.
3. Check that the storing area's humidity is to / below specifications, follow 70% if there is no specification.
elements.expectedResult:
1. The cartons shall be stored in correct conditions and free from any effect from moisture.
2. The storage areas shall clean, dry, ventilated and without the presence of mold / water. 
3. The humidity shall be to / below specifications.


- If HIGH RISK on this section, any failure remarks should be included on the "FAILURE REMARKS" section

zh.name: 防霉检查
zh.expectedResult:
1. 纸箱应存放在正确的条件下，避免任何潮湿影响。
2. 存储区域应清洁、干燥、通风，且无霉菌/水分存在。
3. 湿度应符合/低于规格。
- 如果此部分为高风险，任何失败备注应包含在“失败备注”部分。
zh.instruction:
1. 检查纸箱是否放在托盘上（不接触墙壁/地面，离窗户至少0.5米），干燥（检查纸箱底部）且无潮湿或霉菌。
2. 检查纸箱、产品、面料和材料的存放区域是否清洁、干燥、通风，且墙面无霉菌/水分。
3. 检查存放区域的湿度是否符合/低于规格，如无规格则遵循70%。

elements.name: Mold Prevention Check

elements.instruction: Factory Disclaimer, Draft Report, and COC must be signed by inspectors and factory representatives. Pictures of the signed documents must be provided.

zh.name: QIMA文件是否已签署？
zh.instruction: 工厂免责声明、草稿报告和COC必须由检查员和工厂代表签署。必须提供签署文件的照片。

elements.name: Are the QIMA documents signed?

zh.name: 工厂免责声明、草稿报告和COC

elements.name: Factory Disclaimer, Draft Report and COC

actions.text:
Issued by QIMA Inspection (Shenzhen) Limited
Reviewed by Joseph Wang

THE ABOVE RESULT(S) REFLECT(S) QIMA LIMITED’S FINDINGS AT THE TIME AND PLACE OF INSPECTION. THIS REPORT DOES NOT RELEASE THE BUYER OR SELLER FROM CONTRACTUAL RESPONSIBILITIES, NOR DOES IT PREJUDICE THE BUYER’S RIGHT OF CLAIM TOWARD THE SELLER/SUPPLIER FOR COMPENSATION FOR ANY APPARENT AND/OR HIDDEN DEFECTS NOT DETECTED DURING INSPECTION OR OCCURRING ANYTIME THEREAFTER.

globalRemark.message:

3. PO 088854: 3 pcs defects found; PO 089008: 1 pc defect found; Total: 5% defects found.

en.message:
1. 1219(101.58%) pcs were finished and packed, and the shipment quantity was 1219 pcs.
3. PO 088854: 3 pcs defects found; PO 089008: 1 pc defect found; Total: 5% defects found.

defectsFound.name: Yarn defects (MAJ)
defectsFound.description:
The yarn is drawn out / needle line, has knots, pilling, or has experienced breakage of the yarn visible.
If the product is:
-Inconsistency in sweater knit yarn pattern or motif.
-Missing knit yarn creating hole or damage.
-Slub, broken yarn, thread, filament coming out from fabric.
-Poor recovery on cuff/waistband rib tension.

zh.name: 纱线缺陷（重要）
zh.description:
纱线拉出/针线、打结、起球或出现可见的断裂。
如果产品有：
- 针织毛衣纱线图案或图案不一致。
- 缺失的针织纱线造成孔洞或损坏。
- 纱线、线头、细丝从面料中脱出。
- 袖口/腰带罗纹张力恢复差。

defectsFound.name: Untrimmed Thread Ends
defectsFound.description:
-All untrimmed thread ends on exterior of garment, or interior if shown on outside of garments.
+ 1/4" long is considered Major 
- 1/4" long is considered Minor 

-Untrimmed thread on the interior of the garment. If thread does not show on the exterior, could be consider as minor.

zh.name: 未修剪的线头
zh.description:
- 所有未修剪的线头在衣物外部，或如果在衣物外部可见则在内部。
长度超过1/4"被视为重要缺陷
- 1/4"长被视为次要缺陷
- 衣物内部的未修剪线头。如果线头不显示在外部，可能被视为次要缺陷。

defectsFound.name: Asymmetry
defectsFound.description: The product or its parts are asymmetric (non-design related).

reportTemplate.name: two pics per row after each checklist
